name: Meet the winners of the Hyperdrive Hackathon | Solana Media
snippet:
The Grand Champion winner out of over 900 submissions took advantage of AI to make it easy to interact with the blockchain.
FluxBot, an AI-powered chatbot that enables easy, user-friendly interactions with the Solana blockchain, received the Grand Prize of $50,000 ...
